ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT
Off Calendar May-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Phillip Ernest Anselmo, Esq., (415) 771-0500, plaintiff and moving party appeared in propria persona. Philip S. Horne, Esq. (415) 487-1674, appeared for and with defendant and opposing party Jessica Boswell.

Plaintiff Phillip Anselmo's Order to Show Cause for Contempt as to Defendant Jessica Boswell was argued and the Court did not make any finding of contempt. Tenant indicated in open court that the unit would be surrendered on June 1, 2002. Until surrender landlord may enter the unit with twenty-four hour notice to tenant's agent, Mr. Horne. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
